Author: Serpens66
Name: Unit Costs
Description: Configure recruit costs in Stronghold Crusader Definitive Edition.

Changes: Play -recruits are missing- if this is the reason for not being able to recruit
Do not highlight units as recruitable if extra costs are missing.
Also display current amounts of extra costs in tooltip
Removed support to change vanilla material costs of european units for everyone, because I think the extra costs for humans is enough and it makes this mod less complicated.
